title: Murmansk, Murmansk Oblast — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Murmansk, Murmansk Oblast: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Murmansk is a city in Murmansk Oblast with a population of 290,000. The world’s largest city above the Arctic Circle, a major ice-free port and gateway to the Arctic with stunning northern lights.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
